economic_notes: First Nation holds 11.1% interest in MLTC Resource Development Limited Partnership which generated $4,394,878 in earnings. Also holds 100% interest in Makwa Lake Development Co. (GBE) earning $169,251. Member of Meadow Lake Tribal Council (9-nation organization). Operates Makwa Store generating $3,422,100 in sales. Also has transactions with Makwa Sahgaiehcan First Nation Construction Company LP.
notes: Fiscal year 2021 (ended March 31, 2021). Consolidated entity includes Operations, CMHC Housing Fund, and Store Enterprise. GBE (Makwa Lake Development Co.) accounted for under modified equity method. Limited partnership (MLTC Resource Development LP, 11.1% interest) generated unusually large earnings of $4,394,878 vs $287,191 prior year - potential one-time item. Unexpended revenue (deferred revenue) increased significantly from $3.7M to $10.9M due to capital project funding. ISC revenue nearly doubled year-over-year ($13.7M to $23.4M) driven by capital and COVID funding. No schedule of remuneration provided in the extracted text. Current liabilities calculated as accounts payable $2,071,203 plus unexpended revenue $10,941,319. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $23,445,760 + Ottawa Trust $54,507 + Health Canada $1,457 + MLTC $4,224,809 + SK Lotteries $11,287 + CMHC $857,601 + First Nations Trust $374,728 = $30,970,149 less unexpended revenue adjustment; OSR includes store sales, rent, LP earnings, GBE earnings, interest, and other revenue.
